title: Open the app and navigate to the 'ALL MODS' tab
test_steps: Open the 'Falloutcrafter Mod' app. | Tap on the 'ALL MODS' tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The 'ALL MODS' tab should be selected, and the list of mods should be displayed.

title: Select a mod from the 'ALL MODS' tab
test_steps: Open the 'Falloutcrafter Mod' app. | Tap on the 'ALL MODS' tab in the navigation bar. | Select a mod from the list, e.g., 'Nuke Addon'.
expected_result: The selected mod should be highlighted or marked as selected.

title: Navigate to the 'BONUS' tab
test_steps: Open the 'Falloutcrafter Mod' app. | Tap on the 'ALL MODS' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'BONUS' tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The 'BONUS' tab should be selected, and the list of mods under the 'BONUS' category should be displayed.

title: Search for a specific mod
test_steps: Open the 'Falloutcrafter Mod' app. | Tap on the 'ALL MODS' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the search icon (magnifying glass) at the top of the screen. | Enter the name of a specific mod, e.g., 'Nuke Addon'.
expected_result: The search results should display mods that match the entered name.

title: Sort the mod list by category
test_steps: Open the 'Falloutcrafter Mod' app. | Tap on the 'ALL MODS' tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the 'COSMETIC' tab in the navigation bar to sort the mod list by category.
expected_result: The mod list should be sorted by the 'COSMETIC' category.

title: Check for data persistence after app restart
test_steps: Open the 'Falloutcrafter Mod' app. | Select a mod from the 'ALL MODS' tab. | Close the app. | Restart the app. | Verify that the selected mod is still highlighted or marked as selected.
expected_result: The selected mod should still be highlighted or marked as selected.

title: Check for accessibility/usability
test_steps: Open the 'Falloutcrafter Mod' app. | Use voice commands to navigate to the 'ALL MODS' tab. | Use voice commands to select a mod from the list. | Use voice commands to navigate to the 'BONUS' tab. | Use voice commands to search for a specific mod. | Use voice commands to sort the mod list by category.
expected_result: The app should be accessible and usable with voice commands.
